South Korea 🇰🇷 and Czechia 🇨🇿 are locked in a tight battle, still goalless as the first half draws to a close! Who will find the breakthrough in this #WorldCup2026 opener? 🤔 #KORCZE #FIFAWorldCup
Mexico and South Korea are sharing the goal-scoring duties early in the #WorldCup2026, with two different players from each nation already finding the net!

The PL's deadliest strikers were not always elegant...

Thierry Henry: 4 Golden Boots, 226 goals for Arsenal. Pure pace, dribbling, and power. Could score from anywhere, created for fun. An artist.

Ruud van Nistelrooy: 150 goals in 219 games for Man Utd. Clinical, instinctive, the ultimate penalty box predator. Gave defenders ZERO peace. A machine.

Who gave you more nightmares? The magician or the pure assassin? 🔥 #PLClassics #FootballHistory

Think modern high lines are revolutionary? Sacchi's AC Milan pushed the boundaries of perfection in the late 80s. Their infamous offside trap, executed with surgical precision, reportedly forced rivals into over 400 offsides in a single Serie A season! Absolute tactical genius that still makes coaches sweat. #FootballHistory #Sacchi #ACMilan #Tactics

South Korea 🇰🇷 turn it around in the second half to beat Czechia 🇨🇿 2-1! From a goalless first half to a thrilling #WorldCup2026 victory! What a way to kick off their campaign! 🔥 #KORCZE #FIFAWorldCup
The FIFA World Cup 2026 Golden Boot race kicks off with a bang, as five players from Mexico, South Korea, and Czechia are already tied at the top with one goal each!
Mexico is the only team to hold a perfect defensive record, keeping a clean sheet across all FIFA World Cup 2026 matches played so far!

Forget modern pressing! Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan in the late 80s weren't just winning; they were conducting a tactical masterclass. Their high line, suffocating zonal marking, and relentless pressure revolutionized the game.

They didn't just play football; they controlled space like no one before. Still think Klopp or Pep invented the blueprint? Sacchi's machine was the original!
Bosnia-Herzegovina and Canada have recorded the first draw of the FIFA World Cup 2026, sharing the points and the top spot in Group B after their opening fixtures!

The #WorldCup2026 action is heating up! 🔥🇺🇸 Team USA kicks off their campaign against Paraguay 🇵🇾 in Group D tonight! Can they make a strong statement in their opening fixture? Don't miss a minute! ⚽️ #USAPAR #FIFAWorldCup #USMNT
What a start for the #USMNT! 🇺🇸 Leading Paraguay 🇵🇾 3-0 at halftime in their #WorldCup2026 opener! A dominant display so far, can they keep this momentum? 🔥 #USAPAR #FIFAWorldCup
